codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the session-cookie-client requirements: JWT/localStorage token usage was removed from client auth paths, cookie credentials are included for axios/fetch/EventSource, auth store now hydrates via /api/auth/me, and related tests were updated accordingly.

summary: PASS. The feature correctly migrates the client from JWT localStorage auth to session-cookie auth with appropriate API/store/SSE updates and aligned tests. No blocking or non-blocking code defects were identified in this diff; shared-state documentation/skill-procedure consistency gaps were observed.
